summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of STARTON Insights page and SEO implementation. All 20+ test cases passed. New Insights page at /insights works correctly with hero, featured article, category filters (All/Strategy/Branding/Growth/Engineering), and 8 total articles. SEO via react-helmet-async implemented on all 6 pages with unique titles, meta descriptions, and Open Graph tags. Homepage has Organization JSON-LD schema. Header Company dropdown and Footer both have Insights links.

issues: Mobile menu does not have direct 'Insights' link - only Work/Services/Company/Careers. Users must access Insights via Footer or direct URL on mobile. Consider adding Insights to mobile menu.

The HTML meta description shows 'A product of emergent.sh' (likely from index.html) instead of the dynamic description set by react-helmet-async. This is a minor SEO issue - the OG description is correct.

action_items: Consider adding 'Insights' link to mobile menu for better mobile UX
Optional: Update index.html default meta description or ensure react-helmet-async properly overrides it
critical_code_review_comments: ThemeContext.jsx: Theme state is not persisted to localStorage - toggling dark mode is reset on page refresh (carried over from iteration 1)
PageLayout.jsx: generateParticles() is called on every render - consider memoizing with useMemo (carried over from iteration 1)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 pages tested: Home (/), Work (/work), Services (/services), Company (/company), Careers (/careers), Insights (/insights). SEO implemented on all pages with react-helmet-async. Homepage has JSON-LD Organization schema. Insights page has 8 articles (1 featured + 7 in grid), 5 category filters (All/Strategy/Branding/Growth/Engineering). Featured article only shows when 'All' filter active. Header Company dropdown has Insights link. Footer Company column has Insights link. Mobile menu does NOT have Insights link directly.

insights_page_hero.details: Hero label 'Insights', title 'Ideas That Build Momentum', subtitle present

insights_featured_article.details: Featured article visible when 'All' filter active, hidden when other filters active

insights_category_filters.details: All 5 filters work: All (7 cards), Strategy (2), Branding (1), Growth (2), Engineering (2)

header_insights_link.details: Company dropdown has 'Insights - Our latest thinking' link pointing to /insights

footer_insights_link.details: Footer Company column has 'Insights' link pointing to /insights

seo_homepage.details: Title: 'STARTON — Strategy That Builds Momentum', OG tags present, JSON-LD Organization schema present

seo_work_page.details: Title: 'Our Work — STARTON', OG tags present

page_render_no_regressions.details: All 6 pages render correctly without errors

mobile_menu.details: Mobile menu opens/closes, has Work/Services/Company/Careers links. Note: No direct Insights link in mobile menu.

mobile_insights_access.details: Insights page loads correctly on mobile viewport (390x844)
